archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Editorial Elegance
core_philosophy: Digital Paper. A serious, high-fidelity research productivity tool. Precise structural UI chrome (like Arc/Linear) surrounding a high-legibility, focused academic editor (like Notion/Medium). NO purple/teal gradients. NO generic ChatGPT-clone bubbles. Use pure structural layout to guide focus.

layout_spacing.app_structure: Three-column layout: Left Nav Sidebar (16rem), Main Editor Canvas (auto), Right Reference Panel (20rem). All divided by crisp 1px borders.
layout_spacing.bento_grids: For the dashboard library, use a dense 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-6.
layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Use 2x generous padding. Instead of p-4, use p-8 inside cards. Instead of gap-2, use gap-6 for macro layout.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No heavy drop shadows. 1px borders. Brand CTA uses deep #0033A0 with white text.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized. Border-b only (underlined) for high-end editorial feel, or crisp rectangular boxes (rounded-sm) with focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-brand.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless approach preferred. Use pure layout boundaries (1px border-b or right) rather than elevated shadow cards. For manuscript library items, use subtle border and hover:bg-zinc-50.
components_strategy.wizard_form: Multi-step form with vertical timeline tracker on left, large textareas on right. Textareas should auto-grow and have a comfortable line-height.
components_strategy.manuscript_blocks: The editor is split by section (Abstract, Intro, etc.). Each section is a distinct visual block. A block has a header with metadata (Status, Section Name) and actions (Regenerate, Copy, Edit).
components_strategy.sidebar: Clean, dense. Hover states should feature a subtle left-border highlight in brand color rather than full background fills.

states_and_motion.generating_state: When a section is generating, its background shifts to a subtle striped overlay or it features a pulsing left-border (amber/orange). Text streams in real-time.
states_and_motion.complete_state: Brief flash of subtle green (bg-emerald-50) transitioning to transparent.
states_and_motion.hover_interactions: Micro-translations (translate-x-1) for TOC links. Subtle opacity shifts (opacity-70 to opacity-100) for icons.
states_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-out' universally for UI chrome.

hero_illustration.description: Minimalist 3D geometric composition representing structured academic research, paper stacks, data nodes. Clean white and light grey background with sharp deep blue accents.

placeholder_documents.description: Close-up of a hand reaching for a document on a desk

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-section-button', data-testid='reference-search-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the pure layout/border approach (The 'Grid Borders' look). Avoid soft shadows or generic SaaS cards. Let typography and whitespace do the heavy lifting.
For the Editor section, use HTML structure that separates each manuscript section into its own isolated block component. This allows independent regeneration and status tracking per section.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all UI menus, buttons, and sidebars, but MUST use 'Spectral' or similar serif for the actual generated manuscript text to simulate an academic journal.
Never use pure black or pure white unconditionally. Use the zinc scale provided to maintain a slightly softer, paper-like contrast.
Do not add emojis or generic gradient backgrounds.
Ensure the right sidebar reference panel can smoothly pull data and inject it directly into the active editor block.
